arts.ttl: Real Madrid include players with long-term injuries in Intercontinental Cup squad list
arts.sum: As far as Real Madrid are concerned, if the team manages to clinch the Intercontinental Cup in Qatar next week, every member of the first team squad will receive a winners' medal - even those ones who won’t be physically taking part in the tournament. For their part in helping the team get to this stage (by winning last season’s Champions League), players who are currently out recovering from long-term injuries have been officially registered for the tournament - even though they have no chance of playing.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea make contact ‘in recent days’ to sign Brazil rising star – Real Madrid also in the tussle
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea have made contact ‘in recent days’ for Palmeiras youngster Vitor Reis, but face competition from Real Madrid for him. That’s according to the Brazilian edition of GOAL, who report that Arsenal, Chelsea, Real Madrid and Inter Milan all contacted the youngster’s intermediaries in the last few days in ‘search of first information’. The post Arsenal and Chelsea make contact ‘in recent days’ to sign Brazil rising star – Real Madrid also in the tussle appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for LaLiga match against Rayo Vallecano
arts.sum: Midfielders : Bellingham, Camavinga, Valverde, Modrić, Tchouameni, Arda Güler, Ceballos. Real Madrid have published their squad list for Saturday’s match against Rayo Vallecano.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s latest injury update ahead of Rayo Vallecano trip in LaLiga
arts.sum: The Christmas lights have been turned on in the Spanish capital but they will be outshone by the floodlights (however unsure one can be with Vallecas) at the stadium as Real Madrid roll downtown to take on Rayo Vallecano in match day 17 of the 2024-25 LaLiga season. The LaLiga matchday-17 game between Rayo Vallecano and Real Madrid will be played at the Estadio de Vallecas, Spain, on Saturday December 14, 2024.

arts.ttl: Villarreal star Alex Baena willing to forgive Real Madrid’s Fede Valverde
arts.sum: Villarreal playmaker Alex Baena is willing to turn the page on his feud with Real Madrid’s Fede Valverde, the 23-year-old has explained. The Uruguayan midfielder was accused of assault by Baena after a match between the two in April of 2022.
